name: Western Union
description_short: West Hollywood, CA's Western Union at 8969 Santa Monica Blvd offers money transfer and bill payment services open 8AM-8PM daily.
description_long:
Western Union in West Hollywood, CA is located at 8969 Santa Monica Blvd, a standalone money transfer service center serving the local community. Open daily from 8AM to 8PM, this location provides fast, reliable money transfers for West Hollywood residents and visitors who need domestic or international money movement without the delays of traditional banking.

At this West Hollywood, CA branch, you can send money domestically and internationally, pay bills online, and access cash transfers. Call +1 310-595-1730 before visiting to confirm service availability or ask about specific transfer options. The extended 8AM-8PM hours seven days a week accommodate both weekday professionals and weekend transactions for people in the area.

West Hollywood residents sending money home or receiving transfers should bring a government-issued ID and have the recipient's details ready. Western Union provides secure, traceable transfers with competitive rates when you need speed and reliability.
address: 8969 Santa Monica Blvd, West Hollywood, CA 90069

company_info.headquarters: 8969 Santa Monica Blvd, West Hollywood, CA 90069

pros: Extensive physical network with 150+ locations shown in Colorado alone, integrated into major retailers for accessibility
24/7 online initiation through WU.com with same-day cash pickup available at agent locations
Multi-language support including Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese to serve diverse populations
Multiple service options including wire transfers, money orders, bill payments, mobile top-up, and inmate payments
Real-time transfer tracking and ability to update delivery methods online
Western Union Rewards program and referral incentives for repeat customers
No bank account required to send or receive money, serving unbanked/underbanked consumers
cons: No transparent fee pricing displayed on website—customers must request estimates, making budget planning difficult
Service availability depends entirely on agent location hours, which vary (some close at 8 PM, others at 11:59 PM)
Orange Wallet payment method shown as 'temporarily unavailable,' suggesting platform instability or technical issues
Limited financial product offerings—primarily a transaction utility rather than credit-building or savings tool
Reliance on third-party retail agents means inconsistent service quality and customer experience across locations
best_for: Immigrants and international families needing reliable domestic and international remittance services
Unbanked and underbanked consumers without access to traditional banking infrastructure
Individuals needing same-day cash access without bank account requirements
Consumers seeking convenient bill payment and money order services at accessible retail locations
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers, particularly immigrants and families requiring reliable money transfer and cash access services without bank accounts. The main caveat is that this is a transaction-focused utility with no transparent pricing, variable service hours by location, and no credit-building or long-term financial wellness benefits—it solves immediate payment needs but does not support broader financial health goals.
services: Domestic and international money transfers with real-time tracking
Cash pickup at retail agent locations (Walmart, Safeway, City Market, Kroger, Circle K, etc.)
Online money transfer initiation 24/7 at WU.com
meta_description: West Hollywood, CA: Western Union at 8969 Santa Monica Blvd. Open 8AM-8PM daily for money transfers and bill payments.
